extName.description: Extension name shown in the toolbar and extensions page.

extDescription.message: Privacy-respecting indicator showing whether the current site advertises Encrypted Client Hello (ECH) via its DNS HTTPS record.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown on the extensions page and in the web store listing.

recheckDescription.description: Tooltip / description for the keyboard shortcut command.

popupRecheck.description: Button label in the popup that re-runs the ECH lookup.

popupSettings.description: Tooltip for the gear icon in the popup header.

popupCopyHost.description: Tooltip for the copy-hostname button in the popup.

popupCopySummary.description: Button label that copies a text summary of the lookup result.

popupWhatsNew.description: Link text that opens the in-extension changelog.

popupShortcutHint.description: Hint shown near the Re-check button describing the keyboard shortcut.

statusConfirmed.description: Status label shown when ECH was confirmed in use.

statusAdvertised.description: Status label shown when a site advertises an ECH key.

statusNotAdvertised.description: Status label shown when a site does not advertise ECH.

statusUnknown.description: Status label shown when the lookup failed.

statusChecking.description: Status label shown while a lookup is in flight.

statusSkipped.description: Status label shown for non-https or IP-literal pages.
